summary:
POLITICAL ASSASSINATION AND SCANDAL WARNINGS: Brandon shares a prophetic warning regarding a deliberate plot to undermine Donald Trump through a seduction scandal reminiscent of Monica Lewinsky or Marilyn Monroe. He describes a vision of an attractive blonde woman attempting to compromise Trump, emphasizing that this is a spiritual attack targeting his marriage. Brandon explains that Trump acts as a crucial barrier against the Antichrist agenda, which is why he faces multiple threats, including assassination plots from the Iranian government and potential health crises. He urges followers to intercede and establish a spiritual hedge of protection around Trump and his family so he can complete his divine assignment.

GLOBAL CONFLICT AND GEOPOLITICAL TENSIONS: Brandon urgently warns of an impending major world war that could draw in numerous global powers, including the United States, European nations, China, and Russia. He points to a critical upcoming meeting in Anchorage, Alaska, cautioning American leadership and Zelensky against strong-arming or provoking Putin, whom he refers to as the bear. Furthermore, Brandon highlights celestial signs, such as a massive blood moon expected in September, which coincide with potential United Nations actions regarding the division of Jerusalem and a two-state solution for Palestine. He also exposes the presence of internal leaks, mentioning that moles within the Pentagon and the White House are secretly sharing classified intelligence.

END TIME WEALTH TRANSFER AND HARVEST: Brandon foresees an unprecedented financial breakthrough and wealth transfer designated for the Body of Christ. He connects this economic shift to recent developments in the SEC lawsuit involving Garlinghouse, viewing these events as spiritual victories manifesting in the natural world. This massive accumulation of wealth is strictly intended to fund the imminent end-time harvest of souls and support church infrastructure. Brandon stresses that believers must walk in obedience to become trusted distributors of this wealth during a brief window of opportunity before a predicted severe economic crash reminiscent of the Great Depression.

SPIRITUAL WARFARE AND HEALING: Brandon actively engages in spiritual warfare by taking authority over demonic spirits of lust, perversion, and addiction. He pronounces specific supernatural healings, claiming that gallstones are dissolving like effervescent tablets and failing livers affected by cirrhosis are being completely restored. He commands deliverance for individuals struggling with generational alcoholism and pornography addictions, urging them to renew their minds by reading the words of Jesus in the Bible and maintaining a strict spiritual defense for their families and children.
rawData: [August 15, 2025]-[The Lord showed me a major scandal trying to come to the White House]-[https://youtu.be/rLELZkqyJEQ]-[Hey, good morning family. Praise the Lord. Thank you for joining us again today. Well, it's Diana, my sweetheart, and we're excited to be here. We have some things the Holy Spirit has told us to talk about. Yesterday in the livestream, the Lord was warning us about a Monica Lewinsky-type of a scandal. And a lot of people were really freaked out about that. But I've already warned you. I kept seeing, remember the cobblestone path, and I saw the blonde lady with a really nice dress on. She was a beautiful blonde lady, and nobody saw her coming. This warning that the cobblestone path the Lord has told me about was about Donald Trump, and to intercede and pray for him. He showed me him walking down a cobblestone path. I don't know if this is legitimately a cobblestone path or if this is something that's like a type and shadow of something. And this woman that is absolutely beautiful—this woman had blonde hair, she had a French twist in the back of her hair, and she was dressed up in this beautiful dress, and she was there to take him out. The Secret Service, the people that were around, were not guarded up because of this woman's beauty. So I don't know if this is, like I said, a type and shadow of somebody that is trying to seduce him or whatever. I don't know. Nobody saw her coming, and even the Secret Service didn't see her coming. But the Lord spoke to me. He said, "Brennan, not everything that I show you is just point-blank. It's not as it seems. It can be like a type and shadow." Yeah, that's what I want to say. It's a type and shadow. And so, whenever he was telling me, he said, "I want you to pray into that." And now I'm seeing who the blonde-headed woman is. And I want to say, whenever he's been talking to us about JFK—and it would be a type of JFK, yeah, he was assassinated and things happened—but the Lord said, "Marilyn Monroes, Monica Lewinsky's... pray over his marriage." I don't know how many times the Lord has said, "pray over his marriage." Arranged things like that... there are very strong words that I get when I'm praying in the Spirit over President Trump's marriage: "paid off," things like that. These are hard words, but they're the reality of what I feel we're praying over. And it's something to be serious about, folks, because he must finish his assignment for what the Lord has called him to do. And the only way he will do this, I really truly believe, ladies and gentlemen, is by this body of intercessors interceding for him. He was the log in the road concerning the Antichrist agenda. Everybody else was lined up ready, but we had Trump in the road as an oak tree log blocking the path of all this, trying to be the buffer. So, you automatically know that the enemy is not happy about that, and he wants to take him out of the way. So, I've already told you all that I saw the Iranian government saying, "If we can't get to him, we'll hurt his kids or his grandkids, or we have an assignment about this." So, it's coming in every single direction. And even the Lord said about his heart, about his arteries, about all these things. So, he is a threat obviously. So now here's another one. The Lord is warning us about—hopefully it's not already started—a Monica Lewinsky-type sex scandal. And I saw a beautiful blonde woman, a woman that was poised and very polished in the way she talks, trying to... and like I said, I'm not always going to just blame—it's probably going to blame the woman, say it's the woman's fault. It takes two to tango, right? It takes two. So, we're not going to go, "Well, it's her fault, it's his fault." No, it's the devil's fault. And he works with hormones, and he works with all kinds of things. And if he can get an inch, he'll take a mile. And so, that's part of this prayer assignment, is to pray a hedge of protection around him that he would be like a Joseph and flee these situations, saying, "Listen, I've got a job to do, and this isn't about this. I'm going to do what God has called me to do, obviously." And we put prayer warriors assigned around and about him to make sure that he stays on target, because bottom line, ladies and gentlemen, it's about what God has for President Trump. You may not like him. I'm not in politics, folks. I'm not, "Well, it's red, it's blue, it's Republican, it's Democrat, it's the New Party, it's whatever." No, it's lining up with what God has for America for the end-time mission, to line up with Israel, to do all these things, because I'm telling you, God has a plan. And God's not done with America yet. But it's about getting the wealth of the sinner laid up for the righteous with this end-time wealth transfer for the Body of Christ, from what I've seen. And there's a great assignment for this. And people go... I want to say this, folks. I'm not here to talk about money and tell you that you're going to be rich if you put your fifty-eight dollars in the bucket. I'm here to tell you, if you follow the voice of God for yourself, He'll bless you exceedingly, abundantly, above all that you dare ask or think. Because that's just the Word; He said He would do that. But I'm not into all the gimmicks of things. I'm just telling you, it's just black and white with me. It's just the Word, what He said He would do for us. And I'm telling you, it's time for us to walk in the abundance to the extreme, to where it overflows. Not to be arrogant and inflated with pride, but to be a vessel that God can use to pour out His blessing upon people who need it. If you don't have it... it's like the youth building, for instance, in our church. There shouldn't be a need of them having to go, "Well, you know what? We can't do the project because there's not enough money there to do it." It should have a storehouse in the account for the Body of Christ to say, "Listen, we need new cameras, we need new paint, we need to do this stuff." And we don't have to raise a fundraiser to put a parking lot in for the revival. Well, we've got this five acres, but there's no money, and we have to believe God, and God's like, "You know what? It's time for the exceedingly, abundantly, above all that we dare ask or think, to be the people, the lenders that say, 'I've got it. Let's just write the check and get this thing done. Find the contractor. Let's do it and get it done as quickly as possible. In fact, we're behind schedule.' Not to go, 'Well, you know, if the money comes in, folks, until it does, we can't get the project done.' We're out of time. Do you understand? The Lord keeps telling me, 'Brennan, we're out of time.' We're behind schedule with where we are right now and the coming of the Lord Jesus Christ. Folks, we should already be as scouts, like I like being a watchman, seeing years in advance. I'm trying to warn you of what's coming. A plague's coming. War is on the shore. We should be praying against this war. I'm telling you, it's rice-paper thin, poking the bear with this meeting that's coming up in Alaska, in Anchorage, on Friday. And then people go, "Oh, it's not that big of a deal." No, it's a big deal. From what I have seen, this is something we need to saturate in prayer, praying that Trump has wisdom, and not putting... remember I told you, 'handle the bear with care, don't provoke him.' He wants all of it, and he's playing poker. And even Zelensky even said Trump's playing—I mean Putin is playing poker. This whole thing is a strategy. A major war is coming, and he's holding his cards. And I was trying to warn you what was said not even 48 hours after I gave, 24 hours, whatever it was, after I gave you the word from the Holy Ghost, telling you what the Holy Spirit tells you all prophetically. It's happening that quick. He's trying to warn you of things to pray about. And this is serious stuff because I saw a major—because the Lord told me even about the youth, building things, like he said, "You're running out of time. A major war is about to break out. You must pray. This is serious. This isn't just wars and rumors of wars. This is a potential of not a rumor of a war, but a major world war that will drag France, Germany, Italy, the UK, Canada, Australia, and America all into this at the same time." And then on his side was North Korea, China, Venezuela, Cuba, and all these others trying to back up Russia. And it was serious. And that's what I'm trying to tell you. This is something that, you know, people say, "Well, Brandon, with the visions that you see, can we stop this?" Even our pastor said, "Do you feel like we can delay this?" I said, "We always can pray into something and stop something. We can fix a lot of things." I know the Bible says there will be wars and rumors of wars, and I have a major caution about this—that something major is about to kick off. And look, folks, we're just a couple of weeks away from September being here. And then I found out that there's a major eclipse, a blood moon, coming in September. A blood moon coming. Seven billion people will be able to see this blood moon that's coming in September. I didn't even know there was an eclipse, but it's a seven billion potential to see this blood moon, a full blood moon over an area. And those are signs in the heavens. Signs in the heavens in September, the month you remember all these things that the Lord has already been talking to us about regarding September and warning us to pray over Rosh Hashanah and over this timeframe from September 23rd, with the UN making their choices and saying, "Hey, we want to divide Jerusalem and all these things, and a two-state solution, recognizing Palestine as a state and all these things." I'm just like, "My goodness, folks. This is—it's just really heating up." And the Lord told me, "In a 24-hour period, everything's going to change. Watch this." But as I was sitting in church tonight, I could see the Lord said, "Brandon, I told you great financial breakthrough is coming for the body of Christ. It's time to get excited about what's about to happen. The rocket ship is about to take off." And as I told you, I saw Garlinghouse grinning like a Cheshire cat. There's more to this. Why is he grinning? Why is the Lord showing me Garlinghouse grinning like a Cheshire cat? What's happening behind closed doors after the SEC came out and said—the SEC apology—"This lawsuit should never have happened," and they apologized for it? The head of the SEC a day or so ago—articles are all about it—you know, that should never have happened. If we were in it, that was from the Obama-Biden administration and all these other things. I'm thinking from Gensler, and I thought, "Isn't this interesting how it all is coming to a head right now?" This is not a coincidence. What I believe in the natural, what I'm telling you all, what I've seen in the spiritual is coming in the natural. We're about to see some of the most fun days of our lives for the greatest harvest of souls this world has ever seen. When it comes down to praying for Perry Stone's church, when he brought all that up—because I don't even know Perry Stone. I don't even know if Perry Stone likes me. I don't know. All I know is that the Lord said, "Pray for the man." Maybe they don't like me, and the Lord wants me to pray for them because people don't like me. I don't know. I just know the Lord said, "Pray for him. Pray for revival. Pray for John Kilpatrick. Pray for these people because they're going to be pillars in the end-time army." I don't care. All I know is I'm obedient. It's like going—finally we go to every place I always go to. I'm strategic for what the Lord has called me to because I walk in a prophetic watchman gift, and I see way in advance. He assigned us to where we are, and I had no idea what that assignment was for over a year now. He just said, "Stay in the back and pray." And finally, over the last week, he starts downloading to me why I'm there. Because I'm like, "Why am I here? What is my purpose?" "Pray. Okay, you're in a holding tank until I give you the next step." And I'm like, "It's going on a year. Lord, what's going on?" And I'm just sitting in the back, doing what I'm supposed to be doing. Listen, he said, "Get refreshed. Just listen. Just do what I told you to do." When he called us to go to this other church in another city, he said, "I want you to go sit in the back," just like he did here. But then he said, "I want you to address the pastor and tell him that there is a scandal." Within six months, that church fell, along with the other church that I went to. We were there for 13 years, and then he said to give this word and what's going to happen. Bam, it happened. Now this one, he goes, "There's going to be a revival breakout here, all these things." And he gives us these things, but he doesn't give me an assignment other than to pray. So every single time I'm strategic about everything God has ever called us to do. He tells me the assignment, and now he finally gives us one, and I thought, "Praise the Lord." And so now we're praying into that, and I felt like we have ground. And now I don't know if I'll be released or what the next phase is, but I'm just excited. Whenever you finally get your bearings on something—Diana and I, we're people who know we have a mission. We don't just go somewhere just to go somewhere, because God calls us to do something. And when we're there, you know God has told us to be there out of any place we could be. Folks, when all of a sudden it's like, "This is interesting to me." We have all kinds of people trying to throw us things and say, "Hey, please come here. Come over here. Do this." And the Lord says, "No, no, no, no, no. Go over here and do what I say." And you just go, "Okay," and you don't hear anything else. And then finally he gives you a direction, and you're going, "I get it now." And I told her, I said, "Wow, Lord, thank you for giving me more clear direction." And that's why I know we're coming to the end of things. The Lord is coming, and he has strategic assignments for every single one of us. Like my friend came up to me and he said, "Brandon, I got a job offer making big money, and I need you to help pray for it." And I was so excited for him because he's a giver, he's a sower. And I believe with all my heart God has a plan for his life, because I've even seen him stepping out one day and having his own ministry and doing things. And he's like, "I don't believe that. I don't want to do that yet." Now, you know, it's uncomfortable for him to talk about that, but I know what I saw. But it's not for me to try to convince you that everything I see is right. I'm just like, "I see it." And I just go on about my business, you know? But whenever he starts getting pieces of it, and he says, "I've got this and this," and I go, "Isn't that interesting? Write it down." He goes, "Do you remember the word and the details of it that you never said?" I said, "Yeah, you can see what God's doing and bringing it to pass." We're at the last of the last, folks. Jesus is coming, but he's getting his people in position for finances to be end-time distributors. He's a planner. Yes. Oh, what a plan. Oh, what a planner. And God is a planner to take it. And people go, "Why do you think we need this money?" Well, because you're going to have to have it to get the harvest in. And He's only going to give it to the ones that He can trust. I told you, not the bucket plunkers that go and give $5, going, 'Well, you know, I'm tipping God because I want to qualify,' when you make over $100,000 a year. I'm not talking about if that's all you've got. I'm talking about the widow's mite, where you're sacrificing, and this is everything you had, and the $5 is everything. I'm talking about the people who go, 'You know, I gave God 100 bucks today,' but they made over $200,000 last year. And you go, 'Come on, brother.' You know, it's the attitude in what you have. It's the heart with which we do things for the Lord, but you're doing it because you're doing it unto the Lord, and you're doing it with everything you have: 'God, I'm here. Use me.' So, as we see all these 'Don't back him in a corner' things coming to pass, and the alignment of things with the moon, the blood moon with Zelensky and all this, I told you, the puppet, and, 'Well, you know, we're not giving any of our land up.' And Trump's like, 'You better do this. You better do what we tell you to do or there's consequences.' I said, 'Don't back him in a corner.' I remember what the Holy Spirit said: 'Don't back him in the corner.' And that's what we should be afraid of. Here he is, strong-arming: 'You're going to do what we tell you to do. We're putting sanctions on you. We're going to make it really hard on you.' And I'm like, you're going to poke the bear. Don't do it. Don't try to do what you say you're going to do and try to be the big tough guy coming in there. I'm telling you, it's going to backfire. I've seen it time and time again. Do not think you're going to throw your weight around as the United States of America and try to bully this guy in the schoolyard. You're not going to bully him in the schoolyard, sir, no matter what your intelligence. And remember what the Holy Spirit said: 'None of your intelligence concerning where he's at is right. There are secret things going on that you know not of.' And that was what the Lord told me. There's a mole in the Pentagon, there are moles in the White House, and they're leaking your information to certain people over there. And I'm telling you, you think it's all okay, and you're cracking down the whip in Washington, D.C. And I'm thankful that you're bringing security and stability to the nation, but I'm telling you, you have leaks and more rats in the White House, and they're leaking stuff to these people. That's what the Lord warned us about. How many times has He warned us about rats in the White House? It wasn't just about Elon; there are others. And the Lord warned us and told us, 'Pray for Trump. Make sure he has great discernment on who's around him, that he's hearing clearly to protect his family, to protect these things, because he has an assignment.' So, that's my little rant today of my things, what I'm going through. But I just wanted to tell you all, we love you and we've got to pray for Trump. We've got to pray for these things ahead. I wanted to do this little video to warn of some of the things that I'm getting, especially the Marilyn Monroe, Monica Lewinsky type of a scandal that's trying to... This is very serious. This is the most serious hotspot thing that I feel in my spirit right now, that it could actually happen this week. That's how serious this is—a Monica Lewinsky, Marilyn Monroe type of event. I pray it hasn't already, but I'm just telling y'all, we've got to pray for him. So, let's take communion together today. Father, I just thank You, Lord, for the body that was broken for us. I thank You that You were wounded for our transgressions, You were bruised for our iniquities, the chastisement of our peace was upon You, and with Your stripes, Lord, we're healed. And Lord, we take this body right now in the name of Jesus. It's a potato chip, Father, but we do it because we love You, and we just want to become closer to You every single day. We go from glory to glory. You're changing us. And Father, I thank You, Lord, that You died, You rose again, You did it all for us, Father, that we could walk in victory. And I thank You, Father, that right now we're healed by Your stripes. And Diana and I walk in covenant. We walk in the blessing. We walk in Your goodness. We walk in the light. And Father, I thank You, Lord, for everything You did for us. By Your stripes, we're healed in Jesus' name. Now, Lord, we take the blood, and we're so grateful, Father, for church tonight. We're so grateful for ministering to the people. Father, I thank You, Lord, that we make much of the blood, and the blood makes much of us. We apply the blood of Jesus over this house. We apply the blood of Jesus over our children, over our finances, over this room, Father, that we are covered by the blood, and we stay in that place of protection and that shelter of the Most High, and we abide under the shadow of the Almighty. And we plead the blood of Jesus all around us, Father. And we plead the blood of Jesus over our sins today; any open doors, Father, we cover them in the blood. We plead the blood from the top of our heads to the soles of our feet. So, I thank You, Father, for the blood. I thank You, Father, for all that You've done for us. And we take the blood, keeping our sins under the blood. I'm telling you, Diana, I am determined to walk in victory in every area of my life. Like what you're talking about tonight with what the Lord told you about the angels, walking in the victory and pleading the blood over our circumstances and stepping over and being obedient to what He's called us to do on a greater level. I refuse to be lacking anything the Lord has for us. And I'm telling you, it's only by the blood, it's only by His grace and His mercy, and we take it. And I'm telling you, I grab ahold of it like a bulldog on a bone, and I'm saying, 'I'm not letting go until, Father, You touch me.' I thank You, Father, for the blood right now in Jesus' name—the cleansing blood. Lord, we thank You. We thank You, Father. What can wash away my sins? Nothing but the blood of Jesus. What can make me whole again? Nothing but the blood of Jesus. Thank you, Father. Father, we lift up our president today. We lift up this nation. We thank You, Lord. We come before You boldly; we come into Your throne room boldly, Father. And we thank You, Lord, that You know everything we have need of before we even have need of it. You know, God, what's going on with President Trump and his marriage and all the things that You've shown me about the blonde woman. And You wouldn't tell me about it if there wasn't something, because You don't gossip, and You're not up there going, 'Hey, just wanted to let you know.' You're telling me so we can pray for him. You're telling me so we can cover our president in the blood because the enemy has a plan to take him out. It's not there to gossip, it's not there to expose and do the things that the world would do with it, but we're called to put a hedge around and about him. So, Father, right now in the name of Jesus, I put angels from the north, the south, the east, and the west around about our president, and I pray over his marriage and everything that I've seen and the things that You've warned us about. Father, I thank You, Lord, that we're led by Your Spirit, and we pray for him right now in the name of Jesus. And we take authority over these spirits of lust, perversion, adultery, and this promiscuous spirit with Jezebels and all this other stuff. Father, I thank You, Lord, that the blood of Jesus Christ covers our president. And I thank You, Lord, that there is a conviction of sin. Father, that this woman—we know who she is, but Father, we cover her. And Father, she knows you and she hears you, and you'll visit her even in the midnight hour to say, "Don't do this. Don't do this. This is a plan, a strategic plan. There's no good coming out of this. Yes, it's the president. Yes, there's power, and you are being led by the devil right now and by your emotions." Father, I thank you, Lord, that this is coming down in the name of Jesus. We plead the blood of Jesus all around this circumstance even before it would come in contact. Father, we cover this mind. I see it. It's a demonic spirit that's attached to him. I don't feel like I should say all this out loud. I just saw some stuff. I don't think I should say that out loud. I think we should just tiptoe on that one. Father, I cover his mind in the blood of Jesus. This is something that has been going on for several decades now: from one parent, from one child, the mother. You see what I'm saying? From the original, and it keeps coming down. It's a spirit that hasn't been dealt with. And once you get away with it once, it's easier to do it twice, a third time, a fourth time, you know. And this is something that is a root, and the root has nasty fruit. So when we're praying, we're dealing with the root of a spirit that has been yielded to more than once. And so, because of this, it has got a stronghold. And the stronghold has made it a reprobate mind that only comes out kind of bloodthirsty. Does that make sense, what I want to say? But perverse, sexually thirsty. It's a spirit behind the individual. It's not something that—when you yield to a demonic spirit, it takes you over and you think you've buried it and dealt with it, and you may be able to surface with it and be okay with it, but it's still there. Women are not an object to conquer sexually. They're to be honored. God has a plan on every single woman just like he has on every single man. But sometimes men of power use women as a sexual object to conquer when they are attractive or you have a lot of money. It's sport, from what I see. That's all I will touch with that. I probably said too much, but does it make sense? That's very dangerous. I just saw into the depth of that. And this has been going on clear back to the '70s. I mean a long time. Father, we just thank you, Lord, that he fulfills the purpose of what you've called him to do and you visit him in the midnight hour. I thank you, Father, that all hidden things would be revealed, but, Father, there would be a hedge of protection around because we don't want any scandals. We don't want any scandals, Father, and we thank you, Father, there's a hedge of protection around this, and it's not generational that goes on as sons. I see it trying to go on his son, Don Jr. I see this thing trying to go on the boys, and, Father, I thank you, Lord, that there's a hedge around and about them. I pray, Father, as a watchman, a hedge of protection, that, Father, our president would finish the task at hand. I pray, Father, that he would do the things that he needs to do concerning you, the UN, and standing with Israel. That, Father, we would make America great again for this season, for a wealth transfer of the wealth of the sinners laid up for the righteous, Father, to turn this thing on a dime. Father, that you would give us our window of opportunity to bring in that harvest of souls. I know it's a small window, Lord, and I know the things that you've showed us, but, Father, I pray a hedge of protection around and about him and around his son and his daughters and his grandkids. I pray a hedge around and about him, Father, as the angels would go with him to Anchorage, Father, and know exactly, Holy Spirit, what to say to Putin in this meeting. Father, I thank you, Lord, that they would walk on this as thin ice and know exactly how to maneuver and operate in this with supernatural wisdom. I thank you, Father, that it wouldn't be ego and testosterone in this, but, Father, it would be spirit-led like Solomon concerning this because I see a lot of ego and testosterone, a lot of ego and testosterone flexing. And so, Father, we thank you, Lord, that there will be a deflating of ego and too much testosterone concerning this meeting on Friday, especially with Zelensky lying like a puppet and Putin and then Trump in the middle. I don't even know if Zelensky is coming, but I'm telling you, between the two of them is enough testosterone in the room. And, Father, I thank you, Lord, that cool heads will prevail, that wisdom will prevail, and it won't be a shouting match like it was in the White House with Zelensky and Trump that day fighting, and they got up and all the steam because I'm telling you, it's not. Father, I know what you showed me and we ask for cool heads to prevail. No ego involved in this concerning flexing: "You do this and you do what we tell you to do or we're going to do this to you." Strong-arming people. Handle the bear with care. And, Father, we pray a hedge around and about this that we handle the bear with care in the name of Jesus. And, Father, I thank you, Lord, that like I said, cool heads will prevail. And I pray a hedge around and about this nation and concerning Cuba. And I thank you, Father, there's an exposing of things concerning Cuba in the name of Jesus that there will be no surprise, any kind of Pearl Harbor attacks. I pray a hedge around and about this nation that the enemy within would be exposed with the vans and the trucks and all the ten major cities. This has not gone away concerning September and all the months ahead. We pray a hedge around and about our nation that, Father, our law enforcement, our Homeland Security, our FBI, our CIA, the ones that are good, the ones that are called by your name—Father, I thank you, Lord, that they are hearing you and they'll know exactly where the bad guys are and they would know exactly where to find them and how to expose them and bring them to justice in the mighty name of Jesus, and the mules. We expose the mules and the sex trafficking and all the darkness that I've seen concerning with all the fentanyl pills and all the darkness that's coming over our border and the tunnels.
